name: AI Personal Brand Amplifier - Main Pipeline

parameters.content:
## AI Personal Brand Amplifier

### Prerequisites
- Ollama on localhost:11434
  - `ollama pull nomic-embed-text`
  - `ollama pull llama3.2:3b`
  - `ollama pull mistral:7b-instruct`
- Qdrant on localhost:6333
  - Create: content_memory (dim 768)
  - Create: pending_posts (dim 768)
- Telegram Bot credentials in n8n
- Replace YOUR_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID

See BRAND-AMPLIFIER-SETUP.md

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ vector: $json.embedding, limit: 1, score_threshold: 0, with_payload: false }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ points: [{ id: Math.floor(Math.random() * 2147483647), vector: $json.embedding, payload: { title: $json.title, url: $json.url, source: $json.source, content_id: $json.content_id, timestamp: $json.timestamp } }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama3.2:3b', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a content scout for an AI engineer personal brand on LinkedIn and X.

Evaluate if the content is worth creating a post about.

POST if: Novel AI/ML research, new frameworks or tools, significant industry shifts, practical AI engineering insights, high engagement potential.
IGNORE if: Generic tech news, unrelated to AI/ML, already widely covered, pure marketing, low technical value.

Reply with ONLY a JSON object, nothing else before or after it.
Format: {"verdict":"POST"} or {"verdict":"IGNORE"}' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Title: ' + $json.title + '

Description: ' + ($json.description || 'N/A').slice(0, 300) + '

Source: ' + $json.source }], stream: false }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'mistral:7b-instruct', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a strategic content analyst for a senior AI engineer building a personal brand.

Extract the highest-value insight from technical content and frame it compellingly.

Voice: Technically credible, systems thinker, forward-looking. Not hype.

Extract three things:
- hook: One provocative line, max 15 words, creates curiosity or challenges an assumption
- insight: The core technical shift or depth most people miss (2-3 sentences)
- implication: What this specifically enables for AI engineers (1-2 sentences)

Reply with ONLY a JSON object:
{"hook":"...","insight":"...","implication":"..."}' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Title: ' + $json.title + '

Description: ' + ($json.description || 'N/A').slice(0, 400) + '

URL: ' + $json.url }], stream: false }) }}

additionalFields.reply_markup: ={{ JSON.stringify({ inline_keyboard: [[{ text: 'Approve & Post', callback_data: 'approve_' + $json.postId }, { text: 'Reject', callback_data: 'reject_' + $json.postId }], [{ text: 'View Source', url: $json.url }]] }) }}

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ points: [{ id: Math.floor(Math.random() * 2147483647), vector: new Array(768).fill(0), payload: { postId: $json.postId, linkedinPost: $json.linkedinPost, xPost: $json.xPost, url: $json.url, title: $json.title, source: $json.source, status: 'pending', createdAt: new Date().toISOString() } }] }) }}
